message:
Wire Proxygen (#5746)

This PR adds Proxygen as dependency.

Related attempt: #5757

files.patch:
@@ -4,9 +4,10 @@
 .github/
 /libtenzir/aux/*
 !/libtenzir/aux/caf/
+!/libtenzir/aux/facebook/
 !/libtenzir/aux/fast_float/
-!/libtenzir/aux/folly/
 !/libtenzir/aux/pfs/
+!/libtenzir/aux/robin-map/
 !/libtenzir/aux/simdjson/
 CMakeUserPresets.json
 build/

@@ -31,7 +31,23 @@
 [submodule "plugins/web/aux/llhttp"]
 	path = plugins/web/aux/llhttp
 	url = https://github.com/nodejs/llhttp.git
-[submodule "libtenzir/aux/folly"]
-	path = libtenzir/aux/folly
-	url = https://github.com/facebook/folly
+[submodule "libtenzir/aux/facebook/folly"]
+	path = libtenzir/aux/facebook/folly
+	url = https://github.com/tenzir/folly
+	shallow = true
+[submodule "libtenzir/aux/facebook/fizz"]
+	path = libtenzir/aux/facebook/fizz
+	url = https://github.com/facebookincubator/fizz
+	shallow = true
+[submodule "libtenzir/aux/facebook/wangle"]
+	path = libtenzir/aux/facebook/wangle
+	url = https://github.com/facebook/wangle
+	shallow = true
+[submodule "libtenzir/aux/facebook/mvfst"]
+	path = libtenzir/aux/facebook/mvfst
+	url = https://github.com/facebook/mvfst
+	shallow = true
+[submodule "libtenzir/aux/facebook/proxygen"]
+	path = libtenzir/aux/facebook/proxygen
+	url = https://github.com/facebook/proxygen.git
 	shallow = true

@@ -666,6 +666,11 @@ endif ()
 # Disable module scanning.
 set(CMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES OFF)
 
+# -- bundled dependencies ------------------------------------------------------
+
+option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_DEPENDENCIES
+       "Default for all TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_* dependency options" ON)
+
 # -- schemas -------------------------------------------------------------------
 
 option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_SCHEMAS "Install bundled schemas with Tenzir" ON)
@@ -706,15 +711,8 @@ set(TENZIR_CAF_LOG_LEVEL
     "WARNING"
     CACHE STRING "")
 
-if (TENZIR_ENABLE_DEVELOPER_MODE
-    AND EXISTS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/caf/CMakeLists.txt"
-    AND NOT CAF_ROOT_DIR)
-  set(_tenzir_enable_bundled_caf_default ON)
-else ()
-  set(_tenzir_enable_bundled_caf_default OFF)
-endif ()
 option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_CAF "Use the CAF submodule"
-       "${_tenzir_enable_bundled_caf_default}")
+       "${TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_DEPENDENCIES}")
 if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_CAF)
   # Try to find the required CAF components first...
   find_package(
@@ -822,10 +820,18 @@ else ()
                      "Dependencies")
 endif ()
 
-# -- folly ---------------------------------------------------------------------
+# -- facebook libs (folly, fizz, wangle, mvfst, proxygen) ---------------------
+
+option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FACEBOOK_LIBS
+       "Build folly, fizz, wangle, mvfst, and proxygen from submodules"
+       "${TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_DEPENDENCIES}")
+unset(_tenzir_bundled_facebook)
+set(TENZIR_FOLLY_MINIMUM_VERSION "2026.01.19.00")
+
+if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FACEBOOK_LIBS)
+  # --- System Facebook libs via find_package ---
+  add_definitions(-DGLOG_USE_GLOG_EXPORT)
 
-option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY "Use the folly submodule" ON)
-if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
   # folly's CMake config references gflags_shared in INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES.
   # We need to find gflags first and fix its target configuration, because
   # Homebrew gflags only exports IMPORTED_LOCATION_RELEASE.
@@ -841,107 +847,35 @@ if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
     endif ()
   endif ()
   find_package(folly REQUIRED)
+  if (DEFINED folly_VERSION)
+    set(_tenzir_folly_version "${folly_VERSION}")
+  elseif (DEFINED FOLLY_VERSION)
+    set(_tenzir_folly_version "${FOLLY_VERSION}")
+  else ()
+    set(_tenzir_folly_version "")
+  endif ()
+  if (_tenzir_folly_version)
+    string(REGEX REPLACE "-.*$" "" _tenzir_folly_version
+                         "${_tenzir_folly_version}")
+    if (_tenzir_folly_version VERSION_LESS "${TENZIR_FOLLY_MINIMUM_VERSION}")
+      message(
+        FATAL_ERROR
+          "Found Folly ${_tenzir_folly_version} but Tenzir requires Folly >="
+          " ${TENZIR_FOLLY_MINIMUM_VERSION}.")
+    endif ()
+  else ()
+    message(
+      WARNING
+        "Found Folly without a version string; skipping minimum version verification."
+    )
+  endif ()
   find_package(glog REQUIRED)
+  find_package(proxygen REQUIRED CONFIG)
   dependency_summary("folly" Folly::folly "Dependencies")
+  dependency_summary("proxygen" proxygen::proxygen "Dependencies")
 else ()
-  if (NOT EXISTS
-      "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/folly/CMakeLists.txt")
-    message(
-      FATAL_ERROR
-        "folly not found, either use -Dfolly_dir=... or initialize the"
-        " libtenzir/aux/folly submodule")
-  endif ()
-  # Configure folly build options
-  set(BUILD_TESTS
-      OFF
-      CACHE BOOL "")
-  set(BUILD_BENCHMARKS
-      OFF
-      CACHE BOOL "")
-  set(FOLLY_HAVE_LIBGFLAGS
-      OFF
-      CACHE BOOL "")
-  # Prevent Folly's FindGflags.cmake from finding gflags, because folly-deps.cmake
-  # would override the FOLLY_HAVE_LIBGFLAGS cache variable with a regular variable
-  # set to ${LIBGFLAGS_FOUND}. This causes duplicate gflags flag registrations at
-  # runtime when libgflags.so is also loaded via libglog.so.
-  set(CMAKE_DISABLE_FIND_PACKAGE_Gflags TRUE)
   add_definitions(-DGLOG_USE_GLOG_EXPORT)
-  # Disable malloc_usable_size - conflicts with jemalloc's symbol renaming
-  set(FOLLY_HAVE_MALLOC_USABLE_SIZE
-      OFF
-      CACHE BOOL "")
-  # Point folly to our bundled fast_float.
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FASTFLOAT)
-    set(FASTFLOAT_INCLUDE_DIR
-        "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/fast_float/include>"
-        CACHE PATH "")
-  endif ()
-  # Find blake3 if available - folly uses __has_include(<blake3.h>) to compile
-  # blake3 support, so we must link against it when the header is found.
-  find_package(blake3 CONFIG QUIET)
-  if (blake3_FOUND)
-    list(APPEND FOLLY_LINK_LIBRARIES BLAKE3::blake3)
-  endif ()
-  # Pass SSE/AVX flags to folly to ensure F14 containers use the same intrinsics
-  # mode across all compilation units. Without this, folly's F14Table.cpp may be
-  # compiled with different SIMD settings than code using F14 headers, causing
-  # link errors due to F14LinkCheck mismatch.
-  # We temporarily modify CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS because folly's folly_add_library()
-  # function uses cmake_parse_arguments with prefix FOLLY_LIB, which shadows
-  # any variable named FOLLY_LIB_COMPILE_OPTIONS set from the parent scope.
-  set(_saved_cxx_flags "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}")
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE_INSTRUCTIONS)
-    string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse")
-  endif ()
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE2_INSTRUCTIONS)
-    string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse2")
-  endif ()
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE3_INSTRUCTIONS)
-    string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse3")
-  endif ()
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSSE3_INSTRUCTIONS)
-    string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -mssse3")
-  endif ()
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE4_1_INSTRUCTIONS)
-    string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse4.1")
-  endif ()
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE4_2_INSTRUCTIONS)
-    string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse4.2")
-  endif ()
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_AVX_INSTRUCTIONS)
-    string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -mavx")
-  endif ()
-  if (TENZIR_ENABLE_AVX2_INSTRUCTIONS)
-    string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -mavx2")
-  endif ()
-  message(STATUS "Folly CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS: ${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}")
-  # Force folly to build as a static library for two reasons:
-  # 1. On macOS, std::current_exception() returns nullptr in coroutine
-  #    unhandled_exception() handlers when folly crosses shared library
-  #    boundaries.
-  # 2. On Linux aarch64, folly's CMake has duplicate aor (Arm Optimized
-  #    Routines) object targets that cause multiple definition errors when
-  #    building as a shared library.
-  set(_saved_build_shared_libs "${BUILD_SHARED_LIBS}")
-  set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF)
-  # When the main build uses shared libraries, folly must be compiled with
-  # -fPIC even though it's built as a static library, because it will be
-  # linked into a shared library.
-  if (_saved_build_shared_libs)
-    set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
-  endif ()
-  add_subdirectory(libtenzir/aux/folly SYSTEM)
-  unset(CMAKE_DISABLE_FIND_PACKAGE_Gflags)
-  set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS "${_saved_build_shared_libs}")
-  set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${_saved_cxx_flags}")
-  if (NOT TARGET Folly::folly)
-    add_library(Folly::folly ALIAS folly)
-  endif ()
-  # Set variable to include bundled folly in exports
-  set(_tenzir_bundled_folly folly folly_deps)
-  dependency_summary("folly" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/folly"
-                     "Dependencies")
+  add_subdirectory(libtenzir/aux/facebook)
 endif ()
 
 if (TENZIR_ENABLE_RELOCATABLE_INSTALLATIONS

         "CMAKE_FIND_USE_PACKAGE_REGISTRY": "OFF",
         "CMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT": "",

-        "TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_CAF": "OFF",

       }

       -D TENZIR_ENABLE_DEVELOPER_MODE:BOOL="OFF" \

       -D TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_SIMDJSON:BOOL="ON" \
       -D TENZIR_ENABLE_MANPAGES:BOOL="OFF" \
       -D TENZIR_ENABLE_PYTHON_BINDINGS_DEPENDENCIES:BOOL="ON" \
@@ -206,7 +206,9 @@ RUN apt-get update && \
       gnupg2 \
       libasan8 \
       libboost-context1.83.0 \
+      libboost-date-time1.83.0 \
       libboost-filesystem1.83.0 \
+      libboost-iostreams1.83.0 \
       libboost-program-options1.83.0 \
       libboost-regex1.83.0 \
       libboost-stacktrace1.83.0 \
@@ -276,7 +278,7 @@ COPY contrib/tenzir-plugins/compaction ./contrib/tenzir-plugins/compaction
 RUN --mount=target=/ccache,type=cache,from=cache-context \
     cmake -S contrib/tenzir-plugins/compaction -B build-compaction -G Ninja \
       -D CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:STRING="$PREFIX" && \
-    cmake --build build-compaction --parallel 1 && \
+    cmake --build build-compaction --parallel && \
     DESTDIR=/plugin/compaction cmake --install build-compaction --component Runtime && \
     rm -rf build-compaction

@@ -228,6 +228,7 @@ function (TenzirCompileFlatBuffers)
   list(APPEND FBS_SCHEMAS ${included_flatbuffers_schemas})
   list(REMOVE_DUPLICATES FBS_SCHEMAS)
 
+  set(_fbs_outputs "")
   foreach (schema IN LISTS FBS_SCHEMAS)
     get_filename_component(basename ${schema} NAME_WE)
     # The hardcoded path that flatc generates.
@@ -280,12 +281,23 @@ function (TenzirCompileFlatBuffers)
                       DEPENDS "${desired_file}")
     add_dependencies(${FBS_TARGET}
                      "compile-flatbuffers-schema-${FBS_TARGET}-${basename}")
+    list(APPEND _fbs_outputs "${desired_file}")
     set_property(
       TARGET ${FBS_TARGET}
       APPEND
       PROPERTY PUBLIC_HEADER "${desired_file}" "${schema}")
   endforeach ()
 
+  # The INTERFACE library above cannot be built directly (e.g., via
+  # `ninja libtenzir-fbs`), so we add a custom target that only depends
+  # on the generated header files without going through the INTERFACE
+  # library and its link dependencies.
+  add_custom_target(compile-${FBS_TARGET} DEPENDS ${_fbs_outputs})
+  if (NOT TARGET compile-flatbuffers)
+    add_custom_target(compile-flatbuffers)
+  endif ()
+  add_dependencies(compile-flatbuffers compile-${FBS_TARGET})
+
   install(
     TARGETS ${FBS_TARGET}
     EXPORT TenzirTargets
@@ -784,8 +796,13 @@ function (TenzirRegisterPlugin)
                                                         tenzir::internal)
     TenzirTargetLinkWholeArchive(${PLUGIN_TARGET}-test PRIVATE
                                  ${PLUGIN_TARGET}-static)
-    TenzirTargetLinkWholeArchive(${PLUGIN_TARGET}-test PRIVATE
-                                 tenzir::libtenzir_builtins)
+    if ("${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}" STREQUAL "Tenzir")
+      TenzirTargetLinkWholeArchive(${PLUGIN_TARGET}-test PRIVATE
+                                   tenzir::libtenzir_builtins)
+    else ()
+      target_link_libraries(${PLUGIN_TARGET}-test
+                            PRIVATE tenzir::libtenzir_builtins)
+    endif ()
     add_test(NAME build-${PLUGIN_TARGET}-test
              COMMAND "${CMAKE_COMMAND}" --build "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}" --config
                      "$<CONFIG>" --target ${PLUGIN_TARGET}-test)

@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # investigate switching to a different map, e.g., from folly or abseil.
 
 option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_ROBIN_MAP "Always use the bundled tsl-robin-map"
-       OFF)
+       "${TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_DEPENDENCIES}")
 if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_ROBIN_MAP)
   find_package(tsl-robin-map QUIET)
   if (tsl-robin-map_FOUND)
@@ -110,25 +110,43 @@ endif ()
 # -- aws sdk (for direct S3 object deletion) -----------------------------------
 
 if (ARROW_S3)
-  find_package(AWSSDK COMPONENTS s3 REQUIRED CONFIG)
-  string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
-         "\nfind_package(AWSSDK COMPONENTS s3 REQUIRED CONFIG)")
+  find_package(
+    AWSSDK
+    COMPONENTS s3 sts identity-management
+    REQUIRED CONFIG)
+  if (NOT BUILD_SHARED_LIBS)
+    string(
+      APPEND
+      TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
+      "\nfind_package(AWSSDK COMPONENTS s3 sts identity-management REQUIRED CONFIG)"
+    )
+  endif ()
   dependency_summary("AWS SDK S3" ${AWSSDK_CORE_HEADER_FILE} "Dependencies")
 endif ()
 
 # -- azure sdk (for direct Azure blob deletion) --------------------------------
 
 if (ARROW_AZURE)
   find_package(azure-storage-blobs-cpp CONFIG REQUIRED)
-  string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
-         "\nfind_package(azure-storage-blobs-cpp CONFIG REQUIRED)")
+  if (NOT BUILD_SHARED_LIBS)
+    string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
+           "\nfind_package(azure-storage-blobs-cpp CONFIG REQUIRED)")
+  endif ()
   dependency_summary("Azure Storage Blobs" Azure::azure-storage-blobs
                      "Dependencies")
 endif ()
 
 # -- boost ---------------------------------------------------------------------
 
-find_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS headers filesystem url context program_options regex thread)
+find_package(
+  Boost REQUIRED
+  COMPONENTS headers
+             filesystem
+             url
+             context
+             program_options
+             regex
+             thread)
 
 # -- re2 -----------------------------------------------------------------------
 
@@ -153,7 +171,8 @@ provide_find_module(c-ares)
 # Use MODULE mode to avoid broken CMake config in static Nix builds
 
 find_package(EXPAT REQUIRED MODULE)
-string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(EXPAT REQUIRED MODULE)")
+string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
+       "\nfind_package(EXPAT REQUIRED MODULE)")
 dependency_summary("expat" EXPAT::EXPAT "Dependencies")
 
 # -- jemalloc ------------------------------------------------------------------
@@ -386,7 +405,8 @@ target_link_libraries(libtenzir PUBLIC spdlog::spdlog)
 dependency_summary("spdlog" spdlog::spdlog "Dependencies")
 
 # Link against simdjson
-option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_SIMDJSON "Use the simdjson submodule" OFF)
+option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_SIMDJSON "Use the simdjson submodule"
+       "${TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_DEPENDENCIES}")
 
 unset(_tenzir_bundled_simdjson)
 if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_SIMDJSON)
@@ -475,12 +495,20 @@ if (ARROW_AZURE)
 endif ()
 
 # Link against Boost.
-target_link_libraries(libtenzir PUBLIC Boost::headers Boost::filesystem
-                                       Boost::url Boost::context
-                                       Boost::program_options Boost::regex
-                                       Boost::thread)
-string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
-       "\nfind_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS headers filesystem url context program_options regex thread)")
+target_link_libraries(
+  libtenzir
+  PUBLIC Boost::headers
+         Boost::filesystem
+         Boost::url
+         Boost::context
+         Boost::program_options
+         Boost::regex
+         Boost::thread)
+string(
+  APPEND
+  TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
+  "\nfind_package(Boost REQUIRED COMPONENTS headers filesystem url context program_options regex thread)"
+)
 dependency_summary("Boost" Boost::headers "Dependencies")
 
 # Link against re2.
@@ -489,10 +517,40 @@ string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(re2 REQUIRED)")
 dependency_summary("re2" re2::re2 "Dependencies")
 
 # Link against folly.
-target_link_libraries(libtenzir PUBLIC Folly::folly)
-if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FOLLY)
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FACEBOOK_LIBS)
+  # All Facebook libs are static archives linked into libtenzir.so.
+  # Use BUILD_LOCAL_INTERFACE to keep them visible in the local build
+  # tree but invisible in export()/install(EXPORT), avoiding a cascade
+  # of internal targets leaking into the TenzirTargets export set.
+  target_link_libraries(libtenzir PUBLIC $<BUILD_LOCAL_INTERFACE:Folly::folly>)
+else ()
+  target_link_libraries(libtenzir PUBLIC Folly::folly)
+  # Ensure Folly's own headers are preferred over system includes to avoid
+  # ABI/constructor mismatches from mixed folly installations.
+  get_target_property(_tenzir_folly_include_dirs Folly::folly
+                      INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES)
+  if (_tenzir_folly_include_dirs)
+    target_include_directories(libtenzir BEFORE
+                               PRIVATE ${_tenzir_folly_include_dirs})
+  endif ()
+  string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST
+         "\nfind_package(glog CONFIG REQUIRED)")
   string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(folly REQUIRED)")
 endif ()
+target_link_libraries(libtenzir PRIVATE proxygen::proxygenhttpserver)
+# For the bundled case libtenzir_builtins is a static library whose private
+# deps would normally propagate into the export set. BUILD_LOCAL_INTERFACE
+# prevents that; the proxygen symbols are resolved through libtenzir.so
+# which consumers also link.
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FACEBOOK_LIBS)
+  target_link_libraries(
+    libtenzir_builtins
+    PRIVATE $<BUILD_LOCAL_INTERFACE:proxygen::proxygenhttpserver>)
+else ()
+  target_link_libraries(libtenzir_builtins PRIVATE proxygen::proxygenhttpserver)
+endif ()
+target_compile_definitions(libtenzir PRIVATE TENZIR_HAS_PROXYGEN=1)
+target_compile_definitions(libtenzir_builtins PRIVATE TENZIR_HAS_PROXYGEN=1)
 # gflags is a transitive dependency of glog (used by folly). We must re-export
 # find_package(gflags) so that plugins can resolve the gflags_shared cmake
 # target that appears in the exported transitive link libraries.
@@ -504,7 +562,8 @@ string(APPEND TENZIR_FIND_DEPENDENCY_LIST "\nfind_package(reproc++ REQUIRED)")
 dependency_summary("reproc++" reproc+++ "Dependencies")
 
 # Link against fast_float
-option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FASTFLOAT "Use the fast_float submodule" OFF)
+option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FASTFLOAT "Use the fast_float submodule"
+       "${TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_DEPENDENCIES}")
 if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FASTFLOAT)
   find_package(FastFloat CONFIG)
 endif ()
@@ -527,7 +586,8 @@ target_link_libraries(libtenzir PRIVATE FastFloat::fast_float)
 
 unset(_tenzir_bundled_pfs)
 if (${CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME} STREQUAL "Linux")
-  option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PFS "Use the pfs submodule" OFF)
+  option(TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PFS "Use the pfs submodule"
+         "${TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_DEPENDENCIES}")
   if (NOT TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_PFS)
     find_package(pfs CONFIG)
   endif ()
@@ -663,7 +723,7 @@ endif ()
 # the plugin unit test binaries need to be able to link against it.
 install(
   TARGETS libtenzir libtenzir_builtins ${_tenzir_bundled_simdjson}
-          ${_tenzir_bundled_pfs} ${_tenzir_bundled_folly}
+          ${_tenzir_bundled_pfs} ${_tenzir_bundled_facebook}
   EXPORT TenzirTargets
   ARCHIVE DESTINATION "${TENZIR_INSTALL_ARCHIVEDIR}" COMPONENT Development
   LIBRARY DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}" COMPONENT Runtime

@@ -0,0 +1,252 @@
+# Build folly, fizz, wangle, mvfst, and proxygen from submodules as static
+# archives. All five libraries are linked into libtenzir.so so that there is
+# exactly one copy of every folly singleton in the process.
+
+# Validate all submodules exist. Some repos (fizz, wangle) have their
+# CMakeLists.txt in a subdirectory named after the project.
+foreach (_fb_lib folly mvfst proxygen)
+  if (NOT EXISTS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${_fb_lib}/CMakeLists.txt")
+    message(
+      FATAL_ERROR
+        "${_fb_lib} not found. Initialize submodule libtenzir/aux/facebook/${_fb_lib}"
+    )
+  endif ()
+endforeach ()
+foreach (_fb_lib fizz wangle)
+  if (NOT
+      EXISTS
+      "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/${_fb_lib}/${_fb_lib}/CMakeLists.txt")
+    message(
+      FATAL_ERROR
+        "${_fb_lib} not found. Initialize submodule libtenzir/aux/facebook/${_fb_lib}"
+    )
+  endif ()
+endforeach ()
+
+# Common setup
+find_package(glog REQUIRED)
+
+# Prefer bundled Facebook headers over any globally installed copies (e.g.
+# Homebrew) so all five libs compile against a consistent API surface.
+include_directories(
+  BEFORE
+  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/folly"
+  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/fizz"
+  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/wangle"
+  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/mvfst"
+  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/proxygen")
+
+# Configure folly build options
+set(BUILD_TESTS
+    OFF
+    CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+set(BUILD_BENCHMARKS
+    OFF
+    CACHE BOOL "")
+set(BUILD_EXAMPLES
+    OFF
+    CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
+# gflags is available from the Nix environment (transitive dep of glog).
+# With all Facebook libs as static archives inside libtenzir.so, gflags
+# registrations go into the single shared libgflags — no duplication.
+# Disable malloc_usable_size - conflicts with jemalloc's symbol renaming
+set(FOLLY_HAVE_MALLOC_USABLE_SIZE
+    OFF
+    CACHE BOOL "")
+# Point folly to our bundled fast_float.
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_BUNDLED_FASTFLOAT)
+  set(FASTFLOAT_INCLUDE_DIR
+      "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/libtenzir/aux/fast_float/include>"
+      CACHE PATH "")
+endif ()
+# Find blake3 if available - folly uses __has_include(<blake3.h>) to compile
+# blake3 support, so we must link against it when the header is found.
+find_package(blake3 CONFIG QUIET)
+if (blake3_FOUND)
+  list(APPEND FOLLY_LINK_LIBRARIES BLAKE3::blake3)
+endif ()
+
+# Pass SSE/AVX flags to all Facebook libs to ensure consistent SIMD settings
+# across all compilation units. Without this, F14Table.cpp may be compiled
+# with different SIMD settings than code using F14 headers, causing link
+# errors due to F14LinkCheck mismatch.
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE_INSTRUCTIONS)
+  string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse")
+endif ()
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE2_INSTRUCTIONS)
+  string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse2")
+endif ()
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE3_INSTRUCTIONS)
+  string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse3")
+endif ()
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSSE3_INSTRUCTIONS)
+  string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -mssse3")
+endif ()
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE4_1_INSTRUCTIONS)
+  string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse4.1")
+endif ()
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_SSE4_2_INSTRUCTIONS)
+  string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -msse4.2")
+endif ()
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_AVX_INSTRUCTIONS)
+  string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -mavx")
+endif ()
+if (TENZIR_ENABLE_AVX2_INSTRUCTIONS)
+  string(APPEND CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS " -mavx2")
+endif ()
+
+# Force ALL Facebook libs to build as static libraries. This ensures every
+# folly singleton lives in exactly one place (libtenzir.so), preventing the
+# "mismatched unique instance" crash from duplicate folly singletons.
+# When the main build uses shared libraries, static archives must be compiled
+# with -fPIC because they will be linked into a shared library.
+if (BUILD_SHARED_LIBS)
+  set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
+endif ()
+set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF)
+
+# Skip install rules while adding bundled Facebook libs — they are static
+# archives linked into libtenzir.so and never installed individually.
+# Restore the previous value afterwards so this directory still gets a
+# cmake_install.cmake for parent include() calls.
+set(_tenzir_prev_skip_install_rules "${CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES}")
+set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES ON)
+
+# ---- 1. FOLLY ----
+add_subdirectory(folly SYSTEM)
+if (NOT TARGET Folly::folly)
+  add_library(Folly::folly ALIAS folly)
+endif ()
+# Write shim config files so downstream find_package() calls are no-ops
+# when the target is already defined from add_subdirectory(). The generated
+# folly-config.cmake has set_and_check() calls that fail because the build
+# tree doesn't match folly's expected install layout.
+set(_fb_shim_dir "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/_fb_shims")
+file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${_fb_shim_dir}/folly" "${_fb_shim_dir}/fizz"
+     "${_fb_shim_dir}/wangle" "${_fb_shim_dir}/mvfst")
+file(
+  WRITE "${_fb_shim_dir}/folly/folly-config.cmake"
+  "# Shim: target already defined via add_subdirectory()\n"
+  "if(NOT TARGET Folly::folly)\n"
+  "  message(FATAL_ERROR \"Folly::folly target not found\")\n"
+  "endif()\n"
+  "set(FOLLY_LIBRARIES Folly::folly)\n")
+set(folly_DIR
+    "${_fb_shim_dir}/folly"
+    CACHE PATH "" FORCE)
+dependency_summary("folly" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/folly" "Dependencies")
+
+# ---- 2. FIZZ ----
+# fizz's CMakeLists.txt is in fizz/fizz/ (repo root has no CMakeLists.txt)
+add_subdirectory(fizz/fizz SYSTEM)
+# Fix include path: fizz uses CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR which is wrong for subdirectory
+# builds
+target_include_directories(
+  fizz BEFORE
+  PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/fizz>)
+if (NOT TARGET fizz::fizz)
+  add_library(fizz::fizz ALIAS fizz)
+endif ()
+file(
+  WRITE "${_fb_shim_dir}/fizz/fizz-config.cmake"
+  "# Shim: target already defined via add_subdirectory()\n"
+  "if(NOT TARGET fizz::fizz)\n"
+  "  message(FATAL_ERROR \"fizz::fizz target not found\")\n"
+  "endif()\n"
+  "set(FIZZ_LIBRARIES fizz::fizz)\n")
+set(fizz_DIR
+    "${_fb_shim_dir}/fizz"
+    CACHE PATH "" FORCE)
+set(Fizz_DIR
+    "${_fb_shim_dir}/fizz"
+    CACHE PATH "" FORCE)
+
+# ---- 3. WANGLE ----
+# wangle's CMakeLists.txt is in wangle/wangle/
+add_subdirectory(wangle/wangle SYSTEM)
+# Fix include path (same CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR issue)
+target_include_directories(
+  wangle BEFORE
+  PUBLIC $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/wangle>)
+if (NOT TARGET wangle::wangle)
+  add_library(wangle::wangle ALIAS wangle)
+endif ()
+file(
+  WRITE "${_fb_shim_dir}/wangle/wangle-config.cmake"
+  "# Shim: target already defined via add_subdirectory()\n"
+  "if(NOT TARGET wangle::wangle)\n"
+  "  message(FATAL_ERROR \"wangle::wangle target not found\")\n"
+  "endif()\n"
+  "set(WANGLE_LIBRARIES wangle::wangle)\n")
+set(wangle_DIR
+    "${_fb_shim_dir}/wangle"
+    CACHE PATH "" FORCE)
+
+# ---- 4. MVFST ----
+# mvfst's CMakeLists.txt is at repo root
+add_subdirectory(mvfst SYSTEM)
+# mvfst's install(EXPORT) adds the mvfst:: namespace, but add_subdirectory
+# only creates bare targets. Create aliases for all targets that proxygen
+# and other downstream libs reference with the mvfst:: prefix.
+file(
+  GLOB_RECURSE
+  _mvfst_cmake_files
+  "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/mvfst/quic/*/CMakeLists.txt")
+foreach (_mvfst_cmake_file IN LISTS _mvfst_cmake_files)
+  file(READ "${_mvfst_cmake_file}" _mvfst_cmake_content)
+  string(REGEX MATCHALL "TARGETS mvfst_[a-z_]+" _mvfst_matches
+               "${_mvfst_cmake_content}")
+  foreach (_mvfst_match IN LISTS _mvfst_matches)
+    string(REGEX REPLACE "^TARGETS " "" _mvfst_tgt "${_mvfst_match}")
+    if (TARGET ${_mvfst_tgt} AND NOT TARGET mvfst::${_mvfst_tgt})
+      add_library(mvfst::${_mvfst_tgt} ALIAS ${_mvfst_tgt})
+    endif ()
+  endforeach ()
+endforeach ()
+file(WRITE "${_fb_shim_dir}/mvfst/mvfst-config.cmake"
+     "# Shim: target already defined via add_subdirectory()\n")
+set(mvfst_DIR
+    "${_fb_shim_dir}/mvfst"
+    CACHE PATH "" FORCE)
+
+# ---- 5. PROXYGEN ----
+add_subdirectory(proxygen SYSTEM)
+# Newer glog (0.7+) no longer transitively includes <gflags/gflags.h> in
+# <glog/logging.h>. Proxygen source files use raw DEFINE_int32/DEFINE_bool
+# macros without explicitly including gflags. Force-include the header.
+target_compile_options(proxygen PRIVATE -include gflags/gflags.h)
+TenzirSystemizeTarget(proxygenhttpserver)
+if (NOT TARGET proxygen::proxygenhttpserver)
+  add_library(proxygen::proxygenhttpserver ALIAS proxygenhttpserver)
+endif ()
+dependency_summary("proxygen" "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/proxygen"
+                   "Dependencies")
+
+# CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES suppresses generation of per-directory
+# cmake_install.cmake files. The parent facebook install script still
+# includes these paths, so create no-op stubs to keep install steps working.
+foreach (_tenzir_fb_install_subdir folly fizz/fizz wangle/wangle mvfst proxygen)
+  set(
+    _tenzir_fb_install_stub
+    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/${_tenzir_fb_install_subdir}/cmake_install.cmake"
+  )
+  get_filename_component(_tenzir_fb_install_stub_dir
+                         "${_tenzir_fb_install_stub}" DIRECTORY)
+  file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${_tenzir_fb_install_stub_dir}")
+  if (NOT EXISTS "${_tenzir_fb_install_stub}")
+    file(
+      WRITE "${_tenzir_fb_install_stub}"
+      "# Bundled via Tenzir; install rules intentionally skipped.\n")
+  endif ()
+endforeach ()
+unset(_tenzir_fb_install_subdir)
+unset(_tenzir_fb_install_stub)
+unset(_tenzir_fb_install_stub_dir)
+
+# All Facebook libs are static archives linked into libtenzir.so. No
+# export/install of individual targets needed.
+set(CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RULES "${_tenzir_prev_skip_install_rules}")
+unset(_tenzir_prev_skip_install_rules)
+set(_tenzir_bundled_facebook
+    ""
+    PARENT_SCOPE)

@@ -0,0 +1,53 @@
+{
+  fetchFromGitHub,
+  lib,
+  stdenv,
+  mvfst,
+  xz,
+}:
+let
+  facebookNetworkStack = import ../facebook-network-stack.nix;
+in
+mvfst.overrideAttrs (orig: {
+  version = facebookNetworkStack.release;
+  cmakeFlags = (orig.cmakeFlags or [ ]) ++ [
+    "-DBUILD_TESTS=OFF"
+  ];
+  src = fetchFromGitHub {
+    inherit (facebookNetworkStack.mvfst)
+      owner
+      repo
+      rev
+      hash
+      ;
+  };
+  patches = orig.patches or [ ];
+  postPatch = ''
+    # Keep upstream install hook, but the DSR directory does not exist in all
+    # mvfst snapshots.
+    printf 'install(TARGETS mvfst_test_utils)\n' >> quic/common/test/CMakeLists.txt
+    if [ -f quic/dsr/CMakeLists.txt ]; then
+      printf 'install(TARGETS mvfst_dsr_backend)\n' >> quic/dsr/CMakeLists.txt
+    fi
+  '';
+  postInstall = (orig.postInstall or "") + ''
+    # With BUILD_TESTS=OFF, mvfst does not install any binaries. Keep the
+    # declared `bin` output present so multi-output derivation checks pass.
+    mkdir -p "$bin/bin"
+  '';
+  env =
+    let
+      origEnv = orig.env or { };
+    in
+    origEnv
+    // {
+      NIX_LDFLAGS =
+        (origEnv.NIX_LDFLAGS or "")
+        + lib.optionalString stdenv.hostPlatform.isStatic " -L${xz.out}/lib -llzma";
+    };
+  preConfigure =
+    (orig.preConfigure or "")
+    + lib.optionalString stdenv.hostPlatform.isx86_64 ''
+      cmakeFlagsArray+=("-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-msse -msse2 -msse3 -mssse3 -msse4.1 -msse4.2 -mavx -mavx2")
+    '';
+})

@@ -0,0 +1,93 @@
+{
+  lib,
+  stdenv,
+  fetchFromGitHub,
+  cmake,
+  ninja,
+  gperf,
+  perl,
+  python3,
+  folly,
+  fmt,
+  fizz,
+  wangle,
+  mvfst,
+  zstd,
+  zlib,
+  openssl,
+  c-ares,
+  boost,
+  glog,
+}:
+let
+  facebookNetworkStack = import ../facebook-network-stack.nix;
+in
+stdenv.mkDerivation (finalAttrs: {
+  pname = "proxygen";
+  version = "${facebookNetworkStack.release}-tenzir";
+
+  src = fetchFromGitHub {
+    inherit (facebookNetworkStack.proxygen)
+      owner
+      repo
+      rev
+      hash
+      ;
+  };
+
+  nativeBuildInputs = [
+    cmake
+    ninja
+    gperf
+    perl
+    python3
+  ];
+
+  propagatedBuildInputs = [
+    fmt
+    folly
+    fizz
+    wangle
+    mvfst
+    zstd
+    zlib
+    openssl
+    c-ares
+    boost
+    glog
+  ];
+
+  cmakeFlags = [
+    (lib.cmakeBool "BUILD_SHARED_LIBS" (!stdenv.hostPlatform.isStatic))
+    (lib.cmakeBool "BUILD_TESTS" false)
+    (lib.cmakeBool "BUILD_SAMPLES" false)
+    (lib.cmakeFeature "LIB_INSTALL_DIR" "${placeholder "out"}/lib")
+  ];
+
+  # Keep Folly and Proxygen on the same release line to avoid ABI drift.
+  preConfigure = ''
+    if ! echo "${folly.version}" | grep -q "^${facebookNetworkStack.release}"; then
+      echo "Folly ${folly.version} is out of lock-step with Proxygen ${facebookNetworkStack.release}" >&2
+      exit 1
+    fi
+
+    sed -i '/find_package(folly REQUIRED)/i find_package(glog CONFIG REQUIRED)' CMakeLists.txt
+
+    patchShebangs \
+      proxygen/lib/http/gen_HTTPCommonHeaders.sh \
+      proxygen/lib/stats/gen_StatsWrapper.sh
+
+  ''
+  + lib.optionalString stdenv.hostPlatform.isx86_64 ''
+    cmakeFlagsArray+=("-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=-msse -msse2 -msse3 -mssse3 -msse4.1 -msse4.2 -mavx -mavx2")
+  '';
+
+  doCheck = false;
+
+  meta = {
+    description = "Collection of C++ HTTP libraries";
+    homepage = "https://github.com/facebook/proxygen";
+    license = lib.licenses.bsd3;
+    platforms = lib.platforms.unix;
+  };
+})
